description_long: This object is a raw steak cut, featuring a thick, irregular slab of red muscle meat with visible marbling and a substantial section of creamy white fat along one edge. The surface displays a natural, uneven texture with some areas appearing slightly glossy due to moisture. The coloration ranges from deep red in the muscle to pale beige and white in the fat, with some darker patches where the meat is denser. A large, solid bone is embedded along one side, giving the steak a robust, classic butchered appearance. The steak appears fresh and uncooked, with no visible signs of seasoning, grill marks, or garnishes. Its overall form is chunky and substantial, typical of a bone-in ribeye or similar cut.
description: A thick, raw bone-in steak with rich red muscle, creamy white fat, and a prominent bone along one edge. The surface is moist and textured, with visible marbling and no grill marks or garnishes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the thick, rounded end of the steak with a prominent section of fat and a clear view of the bone's cross-section.
description_view_1: The steak is seen lengthwise, showcasing the elongated muscle, marbling, and the full length of the bone along the bottom edge.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the broad, flat side of the steak, with the bone and fat cap running horizontally across the image.
description_view_3: The steak is viewed from the opposite side, revealing the curved bone, a large fat cap, and the marbled muscle tissue.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the steak; the surface appears raw and unseared.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, with some areas showing more concentrated marbling near the fat cap and bone.
